name: io.github.phillipboesger/polarion-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for the Polarion ALM REST API, with an optional HTTP wrapper for Custom GPTs.

environmentVariables.name: API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the Polarion REST API, e.g. https://your-polarion-server.com/polarion/rest/v1

environmentVariables.name: BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Personal Access Token (PAT) for authenticating with the Polarion REST API
